tooltipTurnView: View scene state for this turn
tooltipTurnPinnedEmpty: Pinned: no tracker data for this turn
panelNoData: No tracker data for this turn.
panelEmptyEmptySession: This conversation has no turns yet.
panelEmptyNoDataHistory: No tracker data for this turn.
panelEmptyNoBlock: The model did not return a tracker block (<ex-trace-keeper>).
panelEmptySnapshotMissing: Tracker was not saved to this turn snapshot.
panelEmptyRenderFailed: Panel template render failed; check your bundle template.
toastPatchInvalidJson: Invalid JSON (must be a JSON object)
activeBundleIdDesc: Pick from saved bundles below; built-in sample is always available
bundleListDesc: Add or edit TraceBundles: name, system prompt, sample JSON, Handlebars template, and stylesheet. Bundle ids are assigned automatically.
bundleItemSystemPromptDesc: Main instruction injected as system message; server appends sample structure and live state JSON after this
bundleItemSampleStateDesc: JSON shape the model should follow; leave empty to keep built-in or merged value
bundleItemTemplateDesc: Left drawer template with data and meta in context
bundleItemStylesheetDesc: CSS injected into the sidebar panel
sampleStateInvalidJson: Sample state JSON is invalid (must be a JSON object)
systemPromptTemplateDefault:
You are maintaining a structured RP scene state for the Trace Keeper plugin.
After your in-character reply, append a block: <ex-trace-keeper>{pure JSON}</ex-trace-keeper>.
The JSON must match the sample structure below. Update fields to reflect the current scene; do not copy sample placeholder values verbatim.
bundleTemplateDefault:
Scene tracker

Location
{{data.scene.location}}
Time
{{data.scene.time}}
Weather
{{data.scene.weather}}
Mood
{{data.mood}}
{{#if data.notes}}

{{data.notes}}

{{/if}}

epoch {{meta.epoch}}{{#if meta.turnOrdinal}} · turn {{meta.turnOrdinal}}{{/if}}
convBundleIdDesc: Leave empty to inherit user default or built-in sample
liveStateTurnCountDesc: 0–8. Include up to N recent tracker states in the system injection; tail read uses the same limit. Reserved in token budget and never trimmed.
convLiveStateTurnCountDesc: Leave empty to inherit user default; 0 = sample structure only, no history read
